findings.title: Army Sustainment Command — Logistics Support Services
findings.snippet: The Army Sustainment Command manages logistics and sustainment operations for deployed forces, providing integrated materiel management, distribution, and field-level maintenance support.

findings.title: TACOM Life Cycle Management Command — Maintenance Programs
findings.snippet: TACOM manages ground combat and tactical vehicle maintenance programs, including depot and field-level sustainment for Army and joint force equipment.

findings.title: Federal Procurement Data System — Army Logistics Awards FY2025
findings.snippet: FY2025 award data for Army logistics services under NAICS 541614 showing $2.3B in total obligations across 147 actions to 43 unique vendors.

output.summary: Army Sustainment Command continues to be a major buyer of logistics support services, with TACOM playing a key role in maintenance program management. FY2025 procurement data shows strong activity in NAICS 541614 with multiple competitive opportunities for qualified small businesses.
